name: OmopLocationCareSiteView
title: Location → care_site (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description:
Secondary pattern: some implementations (notably fhir-to-omop-demo) create a care_site row from each FHIR Location resource, in addition to the primary care_site row from Organization. The Location-derived care_site row carries the location_id (linking to the location row from the same Location resource) while the Organization-derived row carries the name and place_of_service. The two rows share the same care_site_id and must be merged downstream. This pattern is NOT used by omoponfhir-v54, ETL-German, or NACHC.

Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP: produce a flat row keeping source codes per vocabulary. Stage 2 joins vocab.concept to resolve concept_ids.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Location.id; surrogate OMOP key derived (hash/sequence) downstream.

extension.valueString: surrogate key from hash/sequence/lookup of FHIR id

column.name: address_id
column.description: Points to the location row produced from this same Location resource (see Location__location edge).

extension.valueString: resolve LOCATION reference; downstream maps to location_id
